body:
### Problem

Plugin's submodules are restored after PackedChanged is raised, making first installation and upgrade logics pretty awkward.

### Steps to reproduce

Configuration:
```lua
vim.api.nvim_create_autocmd('PackChanged', {
    callback = function(ev)
        -- Use available |event-data|
        local name, kind = ev.data.spec.name, ev.data.kind
        -- Run build script after plugin's code has changed
        vim.notify('name = ' .. name .. ' kind = ' .. kind)
        if name == 'LuaSnip' and (kind == 'install' or kind == 'update') then
            vim.notify('executing make install_jsregexp in ' .. ev.data.path)
            vim.system({ 'make install_jsregexp' }, { cwd = ev.data.path }):wait()
        end
    end,
})

vim.pack.add({
    {
        src = 'https://github.com/saghen/blink.cmp',
        version = vim.version.range('1.*'),
    },
    {
        src = 'https://github.com/L3MON4D3/LuaSnip',
        version = vim.version.range('2.*'),
    },
    {
        src = 'https://github.com/rafamadriz/friendly-snippets',
        version = 'main',
    },
})
```

Messages:
```text
name = LuaSnip kind = install
executing make install_jsregexp in /home/fluzzi/.local/share/nvim/site/pack/core/opt/LuaSnip
Error in /home/fluzzi/.terminal_setup/linux_terminal/nvim/init.lua..PackChanged Autocommands for "*":
Lua callback: vim/_core/system.lua:0: ENOENT: no such file or directory (cmd): 'make install_jsregexp'
stack traceback:
        [C]: in function 'error'
        vim/_core/system.lua: in function ''
        vim/_core/system.lua: in function 'system'
        /home/fluzzi/.config/nvim/lua/plugins/blink.lua:10: in function </home/fluzzi/.config/nvim/lua/plugins/blink.lua:2>
        [C]: in function 'resume'
        ...unt_nvimeFlbbN/usr/share/nvim/runtime/lua/vim/_async.lua:11: in function 'resume'
        ...unt_nvimeFlbbN/usr/share/nvim/runtime/lua/vim/_async.lua:26: in function <...unt_nvimeFlbbN/usr/share/nvim/runtime/lua/vim/_async.lua:25>
        [C]: in function 'wait'
        ...unt_nvimeFlbbN/usr/share/nvim/runtime/lua/vim/_async.lua:50: in function 'wait'
        ...mount_nvimeFlbbN/usr/share/nvim/runtime/lua/vim/pack.lua:511: in function 'async_join_run_wait'
        ...mount_nvimeFlbbN/usr/share/nvim/runtime/lua/vim/pack.lua:548: in function 'run_list'
        ...mount_nvimeFlbbN/usr/share/nvim/runtime/lua/vim/pack.lua:716: in function 'install_list'
        ...mount_nvimeFlbbN/usr/share/nvim/runtime/lua/vim/pack.lua:1027: in function 'add'
        /home/fluzzi/.config/nvim/lua/plugins/blink.lua:15: in main chunk
        [C]: in function 'require'
        /home/fluzzi/.config/nvim/lua/plugins/init.lua:2: in main chunk
        [C]: in function 'require'
        /home/fluzzi/.config/nvim/lua/init.lua:2: in main chunk
        [C]: in function 'require'
        /home/fluzzi/.terminal_setup/linux_terminal/nvim/init.lua:189: in main chunk
Submodule 'deps/jsregexp' (https://github.com/kmarius/jsregexp) registered for path 'deps/jsregexp'
Submodule 'deps/jsregexp005' (https://github.com/kmarius/jsregexp) registered for path 'deps/jsregexp005'
Submodule 'deps/jsregexp006' (https://github.com/kmarius/jsregexp) registered for path 'deps/jsregexp006'
Cloning into '/home/fluzzi/.local/share/nvim/site/pack/core/opt/LuaSnip/deps/jsregexp'...
Cloning into '/home/fluzzi/.local/share/nvim/site/pack/core/opt/LuaSnip/deps/jsregexp005'...
Cloning into '/home/fluzzi/.local/share/nvim/site/pack/core/opt/LuaSnip/deps/jsregexp006'...
```

### Expected behavior

restore the submodules before raising PackChanged

### Nvim version (nvim -v)

v0.12.1

### Vim (not Nvim) behaves the same?

not present

### Operating system/version

Ubuntu 24.04

### Terminal name/version

Alacritty 0.17.0

### $TERM environment variable

alacritty

### Installation

snap

comment_data.body:
Actually i'm dumb

```diff
- vim.system({ 'make install_jsregexp' }, { cwd = ev.data.path })
+ vim.system({ 'make', 'install_jsregexp' }, { cwd = ev.data.path })
```

Still the behaviour could create some troubles if the submodules are need when PackChanged is triggered.

Feel free to close this issue

It already does it correctly, sorry😅 
https://github.com/neovim/neovim/blob/d2fff0590a45e1ec2a23f3a091af4807b5cf08fd/runtime/lua/vim/pack.lua#L663-L694
https://github.com/neovim/neovim/blob/d2fff0590a45e1ec2a23f3a091af4807b5cf08fd/runtime/lua/vim/pack.lua#L701-L715

title: Plugin's submodules are restore after PackChanged is raised
